enriched_points.expanded_content: Future CER will incorporate diverse methodologies beyond randomized controlled trials, integrating clinician input for relevant research topics, enhancing the relevance of findings.
Advancements in technology will facilitate real-world evidence collection, enabling more dynamic analysis and interpretation of treatment outcomes tailored to individual patient needs.
The future of CER emphasizes patient engagement, prioritizing their preferences and experiences to ensure research outcomes align with their healthcare goals and improve overall satisfaction.
